name: Bunnel
description:
You are lost, stumbling through the underbrush in a desperate bid to escape the hulking shape that pursues you...

You will be stalked, chased, and potentially captured or killed by the giant bunny woman. Play your cards right, and you may get out of the woods alive. Run, hide, fight, use whatever you have at your disposal to try and escape the big yandere bunny. Or, if you prefer, get a closer look at what lurks in the dark...

CW: Potential rape and violence

Great news! The original creator of Bunnel, Yu Ming, has transferred ownership of the character to me! I have some plans for her in the future, including another bot featuring her and her canon partner, and maybe even a comic if I reach a point in the future where I'm a competent artist. For now, I'm making some small changes to her personality. Stay tuned!

UPDATE: Added an alternate start where User and Bunnel are settled in together as per the upcoming events in the story!

BOOM! NO MORE AI SLOP BABY! Art by berry514 on Discord!

I'm writing a story featuring Bunnel on AO3! Click here to read it!
creator: ShakeyCake
